title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-14 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Stories (continued 11–20 of 44)

StoryGap score (%)PM lensQA lensXO lensVerdictSuggested missing BDD
HRREC-91987
PH: Recruiter can select To, From & Subject (UI) when composing an email		35% — Cross-surface tension mostly about tenant + REST parity vs rich Jira UI.
  • Jira — PH: Recruiter can select To, From & Subject (UI) when composing an email
  • Salomon — No per-key query this pass; precedent unknown except epic-wide notification themes above.
  • Deployment Agent — Verify Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications, routing rules, primary recruiter routing, sandbox redirects, and Manage: Candidate SMS Conversations access when testing conversational email.
  • Jira — Exercise scenarios and negatives as written.
  • Salomon — No per-key query this pass; precedent unknown except epic-wide notification themes above.
  • Deployment Agent — Common false “bugs”: missing conversation security, wrong recipient role expectations, internal candidate home email visibility, sandbox email restrictions.

XO MCP — Searched conversationContextInstance; hits include service conversationContextInstance (v1), layouts/conversationContextInstance, WATS read-only REST, and Conversation Context Instance report field—confirm this family covers this ticket’s read/write assumptions.

  • Finding: Jira is the anchor; residual risk is tenant + platform parity.
  • Recommended next step: No material gap beyond noted themes—keep Jira scenarios authoritative.

No additional BDD this pass.
